title: CS50 for Business - Lecture 7 - Deploying Databases
summary: CS50 for Business Lecture 7 covers deployment and management of SQL and NoSQL databases at scale, including best practices for efficient data storage and querying. The lecture is part of Harvard University's CS50 introduction to computer science and programming, available through multiple platforms including edX.
